- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Language extension for Erelang (.0bs) with syntax highlighting, config, snippets.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created VS Code extension structure under `erelang-language`.

- [ ] Customize the Project
  - Iterate on grammar/keywords as the language evolves.

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  - None required now.

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Run `npm install` then `npm run compile` or `npm run watch`.

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - Use built-in F5 to launch Extension Development Host.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - F5 in VS Code. Open a `.0bs` file.

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - Keep README updated with features and changes.
